title: Reflections snoitcelfeR
description:
What is this? Something feels wrong here...
[sine]...ereh gnorw sleef gnihtemoS ?siht si tahW[/sine]
notes:
The event title and description contain mirrored text as a visual effect, hinting at the mirror theme.

For [gold]Touch a Mirror[/gold]: the [red]2 downgrades[/red] are drawn only from already-[green]upgraded[/green] cards. The pool of [green]4 upgrades[/green] is computed after the downgrades complete, so a just-downgraded card may be upgraded again if it remains upgradable. Both selections are random without replacement.

For [gold]Shatter[/gold]: the deck size is captured before duplication begins. Each of the original deck's cards receives an exact clone added to the deck, doubling it. The [purple]Bad Luck[/purple] curse is then added on top.
